'''Esok''' was a [[Humanoid/Legends|Humanoid]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was the leader of Mandalorian clan that came to [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] to earn a living.

==Biography==
{{Quote|And if I take that helmet from you, I guess that makes me 'Mandalore.' I always wanted to be called that.|Esok after Mandalore gives his orders|<ref name="KotOR-II" />}}
While leading [[Esok's clan|his clan]], Esok settled himself on the [[Khoonda plains]] at [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] following the start of the [[Mandalorian Wars]],<ref name="CSWE" /> trying to make a living. While there, he and his men joined up with a group of [[Azkul's mercenaries|war veterans]] under the leadership of the [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Azkul]].<ref name="KotOR-II" />

When [[Meetra Surik]] guided [[Canderous Ordo|Mandalore the Preserver]] to Azkul's encampment on Dantooine, just outside of the old ruins containing the [[Star Map]], Esok refused to follow his summons to [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]], where the Mandalorians were regrouping.<ref name="Prima">[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]</ref> Instead, he tried to claim his helmet in an attempt to declare himself Mandalore. However, the new Mandalore proved to be too much for him, and he was killed in the fight. After the display, Esok's warriors agreed to follow Mandalore.<ref name="Prima" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
